title: Product Registration
metaDescription: Product registration and licensing services in Vietnam for medical devices, food & beverage, health supplements and cosmetics.

hero.title: Product registration services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Import and distribute your products with confidence — we act as your local representative and manage every application and compliance requirement.

sections.heading: Bring your products to the Vietnamese market
body: Many product categories cannot legally be imported or sold in Vietnam until they are registered with the relevant authority. InCorp Vietnam provides comprehensive product registration and licensing assistance — preparing applications, acting as your local representative, and ensuring full compliance with regulatory requirements.
With professional bilingual experts and complete cost and time transparency, we make sure you have all the required documents for import and sale, with no hidden fees.

items.title: Medical Devices
items.desc: Imported devices must obtain a Marketing Authorization (MA) licence and administrative documents such as GMP or CPP certificates, under a risk-based classification (Classes A–D).

items.title: Food & Beverage
items.desc: Importers must comply with food safety regulations; packaging and label changes require approval from the Vietnam Food Safety Authority.

items.title: Health Supplements
items.desc: Products must complete self-declaration or registration with the Ministry of Health under strict food safety standards.

items.title: Cosmetics
items.desc: International cosmetics require registration through the Drug Administration of Vietnam (DAV) before market entry.

sections.heading: Benefits of our service
items: Work with professional bilingual experts for seamless communication with authorities
Complete cost and time transparency with advance estimates and no hidden fees
Direct and virtual consultations with flexible scheduling
Local representation that handles applications and ongoing compliance on your behalf

items.title: Submit information
items.desc: Share your company details and product registration needs.

items.title: Book a consultation
items.desc: Meet with our bilingual business consultants to plan your registration.

items.title: Verify documents
items.desc: We complete KYC verification and prepare your company dossier.

items.title: Begin operations
items.desc: Choose your plan and start importing and distributing in Vietnam.

items.q: How are medical devices classified in Vietnam?
items.a: Medical devices follow a risk-based classification system across Classes A to D, which determines the licensing and documentation requirements before distribution.

items.q: What must appear on food labels?
items.a: Food labels must include the product name, ingredients, origin, expiration date and storage instructions, in line with Vietnam's food safety regulations.
Health supplements require a 'supplemental foods' designation on the label, along with nutritional information and usage instructions.

sections.title: Ready to register your products in Vietnam?
sections.subtitle: Let our experts handle the licensing so you can focus on your market launch.
